title: The Key Is Always in Your Pocket

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why I chase after Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know what it is that's kept Sakura Chiyono O going all this time. It's
pure admiration, unadulterated by fear or resignation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can just remember that feeling, maybe she can pull herself out
of this slump.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Well, um... Because she's faster than anyone, and stronger...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: She's... everything I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was little, I've been good at running, and I loved it... so I
joined a club, ran in races, and took lots of first places.

text_block_list.name: Relative
text_block_list.text:
My my, Chiyo—well, aren't you talented! I hear you're going to join
Tracen Academy one day?

text_block_list.name: Young Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm gonna be the best runner ever! My brother helps me train at
home every day!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
With my smart brother's help, I managed to pass the academy's brutal
exam with decent grades. I arrived on campus with my head held
high, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see Mr. C.B. in that scrimmage?! The way she passed
everyone at the end was sick—I've never seen anything like it!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
No, no, it's all about Oguri Cap! Like, she has to be a genius
runner—her acceleration is insane!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: At Tracen Academy, I was just a normal girl.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm gonna head out, then!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Chiyo. The instructor isn't here, so there's no training today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I was just going to practice by myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Hahhh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The more I ran, the deeper the truth sank in.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Mm, not bad for a new student! We have some things to work on, but
we'll tackle them one by one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ("For a new student"...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Instructor, what do you think my strengths are?

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Well, while you don't put on a show, you play it safe and win in the
end. Plus you're dedicated, and clearly put in a lot of work on the
fundamentals.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A safe, dedicated runner.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Is that enough to become anything?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What do I even want to become here?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Then, one day... one fateful day...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is shooting farther and farther ahead! Three lengths, now
four lengths in front—there's no stopping her!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There she was... a logic-defying, breathtaking "hot rod."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everything I wasn't—it was all bundled together there in red. I was
awestruck.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My pounding heart refused to calm down. Unable to resist, I rode that
wave of emotions, piecing together the words scattered about my
brain...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I may be a safe, dedicated runner... but I won't stop there. I want to
go further... further and further beyond!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how tough training gets, or if she's way out of reach, or
how long it takes. I want to be faster, stronger, like her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to be Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: In an instant, my whole world lit up.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Spaghetti with... coconut jelly and tiramisu? Are old trends making a
comeback?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, ahaha! Nothing like that. It's just, someone I really look up
to was eating this, so I couldn't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Umm, this should be all the magazines with a special feature on
Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's a lot! Thanks a bunch! Mind if I borrow them all?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Of course not, by all means... Hehe, you must really like Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah... Ehehe, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Maybe this is a little too early... No, you know what? "To see the dawn, you must run toward it"!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: All right, this is going to be my new morning routine! Chiyono O, G-O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I remember now... I wanted so badly to stand by Maruzen's
side.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But I forgot all that, and became so lost I didn't know what to do with
myself...
choice_data_list: And what do you want to do now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to fight!
